indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: High ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can reduce noise and provide a sense of openness.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can improve mood and productivity.

indicators.name: No obstructions
indicators.rationale: The absence of obstructions allows for clear sightlines and unobstructed views.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work (Solo) due to its large open area, high ceilings, natural lighting, and lack of obstructions.
